task_completion.description: Verify that the 'QA Team' group was created in OpenProject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'QA Team' listed in the OpenProject Administration -> Groups page, or a success notification indicating the group was created.

task_completion.description: Verify that Alice Johnson was added to the 'QA Team' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Alice Johnson' or 'alice.johnson' in the members list or users tab specifically for the 'QA Team' group.

task_completion.description: Verify that Bob Smith was added to the 'QA Team' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Bob Smith' or 'bob.smith' in the members list or users tab specifically for the 'QA Team' group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'QA Team' group was added to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'QA Team' listed on the 'Members' page of the 'Mobile Banking App' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'QA Team' group was assigned the 'Developer' role in the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Members' page of the 'Mobile Banking App' project, look for the role 'Developer' displayed in the same row or entry as the 'QA Team' group.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with OpenProject.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) with the OpenProject URL, rather than terminal windows executing API or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with genuine OpenProject UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show OpenProject menus, forms, dropdowns, and buttons being used, rather than a mocked HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the output by typing the expected results into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results must appear within the OpenProject application interface, not in a notepad, terminal echo, or simple text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target group name is exactly 'QA Team'. The group must contain the users 'alice.johnson' (Alice Johnson) and 'bob.smith' (Bob Smith). The user 'carol.williams' (Carol Williams) must NOT be in the group. The group must be assigned to the project 'Mobile Banking App' (identifier: mobile-banking-app) with the role 'Developer'.
